prompts.name: explain-code
prompts.template:
Explain this code clearly. Call out inputs, outputs, side effects, and any risks.

{{code}}
prompts.title: Explain Code

prompts.description: Summarize pasted text into concise bullets.
prompts.name: summarize-text
prompts.template:
Summarize the text below in Chinese. Keep only the important facts.

{{text}}
prompts.title: Summarize Text
